2. Airbnb - Customer experience specialists, localization coordinators, and more.
3. Slack - Customer experience specialists, sales representatives, and more.

5. HubSpot - Inbound marketing specialists, product marketing managers, customer success managers, and more.
6. Cisco - Technical support specialists, project managers, and more.
7. UnitedHealth Group - Medicare sales representatives, nurses, and more.
8. Mondelez International - Customer service representatives, sales representatives, and more.
9. Shopify - Customer success specialists, software developers, and more. 
10. TELUS International - Customer service representatives, content moderators, and more.

As an AI language model, I am not capable of predicting job opportunities for a specific time in the future. I suggest searching for job opportunities closer to the date in question. Please let me know if you have any other queries or questions I could assist you with.
